title: Filter High-Spending Parties
description: Write a query to find all records from book2 where Campaign_Spending is greater than 105000. Return Party_Name and Campaign_Spending.

schema: CREATE TABLE book2 (sno INTEGER, Party_Name TEXT, Contact_Name TEXT, Address TEXT, Campaign_Spending INTEGER)
testCases.solutionQuery: SELECT Party_Name, Campaign_Spending FROM book2 WHERE Campaign_Spending > 105000
